title: Getting Started with GIS for Guynode
excerpt: Learn what GIS is, how spatial data works, and how to begin using Guynode datasets in practical mapping workflows.

title: ArcGIS vs QGIS
excerpt: Compare two major GIS environments and decide which platform makes the most sense for your workflow, budget, and experience level.

title: Beginner GIS Concepts
excerpt: Understand projections, coordinate systems, attribute tables, joins, metadata, and layer styling in plain language.

title: Open a Shapefile in QGIS
excerpt: Learn how to load shapefiles correctly, keep file components organized, and verify that your data displays properly.

title: Open a CSV in QGIS
excerpt: Import tabular data with coordinates and turn it into a mappable layer you can explore and style.

title: Open GeoJSON in QGIS
excerpt: Work with lightweight web-friendly vector data and bring it into a desktop GIS workflow.

title: Open Raster Data in QGIS
excerpt: Load imagery and gridded datasets such as elevation or environmental layers, then inspect and compare them.

title: How to Use Guynode Datasets
excerpt: Follow the full path from dataset page to download, inspection, layer styling, and combining data for analysis.
